properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All my lifelong I have panted For a drink from some cool spring That I hoped would quench the burning Of the thirst I felt within

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Hallelujah! I have found Him Whom my soul so long has craved! Jesus satisfies my longing Through His blood I now am saved

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Feeding on the husks around me Till my strength was almost gone Longed my soul for something better Only still to hunger on

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah! I have found Him Whom my soul so long has craved! Jesus satisfies my longings Through His blood I now am saved

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Well of water, ever springing Bread of life so rich and free Untold wealth that never faileth My Redeemer is to me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hallelujah! I have found Him Whom my soul so long has craved! Jesus satisfies my longing Through His blood I now am saved Through His blood I now am saved Through His blood I now am saved
